channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: First Halo: Combat Evolved Campaign Prequel Mission Details Surface in New Claim
item.content:encoded:
Halo: Campaign Evolved is set to bring the first-ever Halo campaign back to life. A 2026 release beckons, and if you can’t wait for something more official, a reported leak has shed some light on the new content.

It’s still disappointing that there will be no multiplayer element in Halo: Campaign Evolved. On the plus side, Halo Studios is putting a lot of heart and soul into the campaign, and doing so involves new features, content, and expands on the Halo lore.

Halo: Campaign Evolved Prequel Mission Content Reportedly Revealed

Halo Studios announced early on that Halo: Campaign Evolved would have three never-before-seen missions, serving as a prequel to the main game.

With the game set to release in 2026, we still haven’t heard anything about the missions. However, Rebs Gaming claims to have a source that has gotten the lowdown on this content, and Rebs Gaming believes the report to be accurate—but this exclusive leak needs to be taken with a huge pinch of salt.

Here’s what Rebs Gaming had to say about the prequel missions (from their source):

“They include an ODST Helljumper who will reignite the old rivalry between Spartans and ODSTs, which started during the early days of Master Chief’s Spartan training program.”

The references to other Halo games don’t stop there, as Rebs’ source also mentions: “There’s a small homage to Halo: Reach in these new missions.”

The leak adds more details:

“I’m also told the new missions feature a never-before-seen Covenant faction with models built entirely from scratch, which is where Halo Studios’ leadership decided to invest their resources into. This new Covenant variant has a much more religious appearance than what the fans are used to, and its way of acting differs a bit, especially regarding technology.

Finally, Rebs says that Brutes are also going to feature in the prequel missions as well. Again, this is all far from confirmed, so be ready for any potential changes or release plans that don’t align with this leak.

Check out the full video right here.

Whether you’re a long-time Halo fan going back to the OG game, or you’re still relatively green on your Halo lore, let us know what you think of this leak through the Insider Gaming Discord. Is any of this likely? Would you be excited for these potential prequel missions?

For more Xbox news, read about the Xbox Games Showcase being announced for June 2026, and take a look at unseen Grand Theft Auto 4 dev kit assets being leaked for other gaming news.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Xbox Games Showcase Announced for June 2026
item.content:encoded:
A new announcement reveals that an Xbox Games Showcase is arriving on June 7, 2026, followed by a Gears of War E-Day Direct.

We just had an Xbox Partner Preview event earlier this month, where players received announcements for several big games, including Stalker 2, Dispatch, Hades 2, and more. Now, they seem to be gearing up for their biggest showcase of the year, which arrives in just over 2 months.

Xbox Games Showcase 2026 and Gears of War E-Day Direct Set for June 2026

A new post on the Xbox Wire reveals that the Xbox Games Showcase 2026 will premiere on June 7 at 10 am Pacific/1 pm Eastern 6 pm UK time. The event will be followed directly by a Gears of War E-Day Direct, providing players with a deep dive into the upcoming title’s new details, gameplay, and insights into the origin story. The event will include first looks at gameplay, news from first-party studios and third-party partners, and more.

Moreover, as it is the 25th anniversary of Xbox, they have decided to bring back Xbox FanFest at the showcase, where players will look back at the colourful 25 years and get a glimpse into the future. If you can’t attend the event in person, the showcase will be livestreamed in “over 40 languages, as well as American Sign Language, British Sign Language, and English Audio Descriptions.” Interested readers can tune into YouTube, Twitch, or Facebook to catch the livestream.

In other news, there are rumors of a new Xbox Game Pass tier from Microsoft that would offer only first-party games. Additionally, the reason that new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma retired the “This Is An Xbox” campaign has been revealed. Are you excited for the Xbox Games Showcase 2026 and Gears of War E-Day Direct arriving in June? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about a Zelda-themed Switch 2 console reportedly being worked on. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Unseen Grand Theft Auto 4 Dev Kit Assets Have Leaked
item.content:encoded:
A GTA 4 dev kit from early in the game’s development has been leaked via the GTA Forums, and it reveals a bunch of models and assets that never made it into the final release.

You just know that die-hard fans will find a way to learn about their favorite media no matter what. This is why it’s no surprise to see a full GTA 4 kit discovered. It reveals new vehicles, characters, and more that were either tweaked for launch or were omitted altogether.

GTA 4 Dev Kit Leaks

GTA Forums user Pingwinek shared a full Grand Theft Auto 4 dev kit, featuring over 100 files.

An 11-year-old thread on the GTA Forums continues to keep the dream alive in the search for GTA 4 info. Pingwinek shared the zip file on March 28, and the list of contents is long.

It has countless audio samples, GTA 4 beta elements, animations, models, and more. The GTA Forums post has sifted through them, and found Ferry models, new Radio Stations, and tons of cut models.

You can check out the full extent of the GTA 4 dev kit right here.

With the eternal wait for Grand Theft Auto 6 going on, this might be a fun distraction to kill some time!

Grand Theft Auto 4 might be nearly 20 years old, but it doesn’t make finding out new details about the game any less fun. What’s your favorite part about these early GTA 4 assets and plans? What’s your favorite fun fact about GTA 4? Share your thoughts and feelings via the Insider Gaming Discord.

In case you missed it earlier this year, check out the new GTA 6 ‘leak’ containing alleged footage forgotten for years.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Zelda-Themed Switch 2 Console On The Way, It’s Claimed
item.content:encoded:
A new claim states that a limited-edition Zelda-themed Switch 2 is in the works.

There’s a chance you might not have heard that some of the biggest titles from Nintendo’s 2026 lineup leaked recently, including a major Zelda remake. The remake is seemingly going to be of one of the highest-rated games of all time, The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time, and Nintendo might have something special planned for the Switch 2 release.

Switch 2 Could Seemingly Get a Zelda Remake-Themed Edition, and the Remake Reportedly has a “Pretty Big Budget”

Speshal Nick recently shared a claim on X (formerly Twitter) regarding a Zelda-themed Limited Edition Switch 2 console. In his latest post, he mentioned being told that “we’re getting a Zelda-themed Limited Edition Switch 2 console.” However, he noted that he is unsure if the game will be offered as a bundle with the console. Additionally, Nick included a screenshot in his post indicating that he was informed that The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time Remake has a “pretty big budget.”

A themed Switch 2 console is on many players’ wishlists, and what better game to receive a limited edition than Ocarina of Time? We’ve seen several themed editions for the original Switch, including models like the Standard, Lite, and OLED. Among these limited editions, The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom version is arguably the best-looking, with other notable contenders including Mario Red, Pokémon Scarlet & Violet, Super Smash Bros. Ultimate, and more editions.

In other news, the voice behind Princess Zelda has discussed the direction and expectations, or lack thereof, she was given during her audition. Additionally, Netflix has secured exclusive streaming rights to Sony’s live-action Legend of Zelda movie following its theatrical debut in May 2027. What are your thoughts on a limited edition Zelda-themed Switch 2 console? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about the Marathon developers committing to support the game for “many years”. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.
